Title: Register new customer
Steps: 1. Go to register.htm 2. Fill personal details 3. Submit
Expected Result: Account created with an initial funded Checking account; user is logged in

Title: Login with freshly registered account
Steps: 1. Log out 2. Log back in with the same credentials

Title: Login with invalid password
Steps: 1. Log out 2. Enter wrong password 3. Login
Expected Result: Error 'The username and password could not be verified.' shown

Title: Open a second account funded from the first
Steps: 1. Go to Open New Account 2. Select Savings 3. Fund from existing Checking account
Expected Result: New account is created and appears in Accounts Overview

Title: Transfer reconciles both account balances
Expected Result: Checking decreases by $50; Savings increases by $50 - verified independently

Title: Transfer of $0 is accepted without balance change
Expected Result: Site shows 'Transfer Complete' with no balance change - flagged as a finding, not a pass/fail bug

Title: SQL - stored balance matches transaction ledger
Steps: Run reconciliation query comparing accounts.balance vs SUM(transactions)
Expected Result: No drift between stored balance and ledger sum
